stocks.impact_theory: TSMC reported Q1 2026 earnings with 58% profit surge and lifted Q2 revenue forecast due to insatiable AI chip demand. Economic implications include sustained AI boom despite Middle East tensions; market psychology shifts to optimism on tech resilience. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 AI rally post-earnings. Analogies: Like a dam bursting with pent-up AI demand; rocket fuel for semis sector.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat expectations, confirmed AI demand strength amid global tensions easing; X sentiment positive on AI continuation, web news highlights revenue upgrade.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +15% gains in 1-2 weeks on AI momentum
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short above $200 with -5% risk if guidance misses
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Geopolitical tensions in Taiwan Strait, supply chain disruptions.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings data, consistent AI demand narrative, high X engagement.

stocks.impact_theory: HIMS ripping higher on retail trader momentum and potential FDA reevaluation of peptides. Implications: Boost to telehealth growth; psychology of breakout fueling FOMO. Parallels: 2021 meme stock surges. Analogies: Wildfire spreading among retail; snowball rolling downhill.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts highlight ripping action, retail sentiment strong; limited web news but volume spike indicates shift.

stocks.justification: Strong X sentiment but less concrete news.

stocks.impact_theory: SEC scraps PDT rule for day traders, shares surge 25%; implications: Increased retail trading volume; psychology of accessibility boost. Parallels: 2021 retail boom. Analogies: Removing chains from a caged tiger; floodgates opening for volume.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Major regulatory win confirmed in news, X breakout mentions; crypto rally adds tailwind.

stocks.impact_theory: Allbirds surges 500%+ on pivot to AI compute infra, $50M financing, selling footwear assets. Implications: Meme-like rebrand frenzy; psychology of desperation pivot to hot sector. Parallels: 2021 SPAC pivots. Analogies: Caterpillar turning into butterfly overnight; phoenix from ashes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Explosive news on AI pivot, web coverage heavy; X not specific but fits movers.

stocks.impact_theory: IONQ up 20% on DARPA contract, quantum news amid NVIDIA/FDA buzz. Implications: Validation of quantum tech; psych shift to future tech bet. Parallels: Early AI stock surges. Analogies: Spark igniting quantum fire; tip of iceberg.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News on defense contract, stock market coverage; X quantum mentions.
